Account.description:
An optional login attachment to exactly one person (Object Account). A person may have zero
accounts (roster-only) or one active account. `identities` are the linked login points and is
populated by getAccount/createAccount; it is empty in contexts that do not load it.

email.description: The IdP-asserted email, if any; unique among active accounts when present.

id.description: The account's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

identities.description: The external identities (login points) federated to this account.

personId.description: The URN RID of the person this account attaches to.

status.description: One of active | disabled (disable is a reversible login block).

AddCategoryRequest.description: Add a category. `name` is the default-locale text; other locales are managed via LocalizationService.

sortOrder.description: Seniority ordinal; defaults to (max active sibling order + 1), i.e. appended last.

AddEdgeRequest.description: Attach the path unit as a child of `parentId` within a graph.

graph.description: The graph code; defaults to command.

AddGraphRequest.description: Add a graph to the registry (instance-admin; graph.manage).

AddRankRequest.description: Add a rank under a type.

sortOrder.description: Seniority ordinal; defaults to appended last within the type.

typeId.description: The URN RID of the owning (active) type.

AddTypeRequest.description: Add a type under a category.

categoryId.description: The URN RID of the owning (active) category.

sortOrder.description: Seniority ordinal; defaults to appended last within the category.

Assignment.description:
The reified link__has_role — the unit of granted authority. graphId is null for unit scope
and names the cascade graph for subtree scope. Reversible: revoking sets revokedAt rather
than deleting.

expiresAt.description: Optional decision-time expiry; null = no expiry.

grantedBy.description: The granting person RID; null for the install bootstrap grant.

graphId.description: The cascade graph RID (subtree only); null for unit scope.

id.description: The assignment's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

AssignmentPage.description: A page of assignments plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

AuditActorType.description: The two actor kinds (D-Audit). An instance admin is a PERSON, never a separate kind.

AuditEntry.description: One immutable audit record — who did what to which target, when, in which request.

action.description: The action code, e.g. assignment.grant, unit.transition, rank.scheme.update.

actorPersonId.description: The person who acted; present iff actorType is PERSON.

after.description: State snapshot / change payload after the change (no secrets; PII minimized).

before.description: State snapshot before the change (no secrets; PII minimized).

id.description: The Action RID (action__<type>) this entry records; the audit log is the action ledger.

requestId.description: Correlation key shared with logs, metrics, and traces.

subsystem.description: Originating source for SYSTEM actions (bootstrap, event-subscriber, …); present iff actorType is SYSTEM.

targetType.description: The acted-on entity kind, e.g. unit, person, role_assignment, account, graph.

unitId.description: The unit context of the action where applicable (drives scoped audit reads).

AuditEntryPage.description: A page of audit entries plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

AuditOutcome.description: Outcome of the recorded action; denied write attempts are recorded too (D-Audit).

AuthorizeQuery.description: One question in a batch decision.

AuthorizeRequest.description: Ask the PDP whether subject may perform action on unit. unitId is omitted for instance-scope actions.

explain.description: When true, the response carries an explanation (DS-16). Default false.

AuthorizeResponse.description: A PDP decision. explanation is present only when explain was requested.

BatchAuthorizeRequest.description: Several questions for one subject; the subject's authority state is fetched once.

CallSign.description: A person's informal identifier / позивний (D-PersonContactChannels). pii:basic; unique per person among active.

callSign.description: The call sign label (required; unique per person).

isPrimary.description: The person's primary call sign (at most one active).

Citizenship.description: A person's effective-dated nationality in a country (D-Geo). A person may hold several; at most one active per country.

acquiredOn.description: ISO-8601 date the citizenship was acquired.

basis.description: How the citizenship was acquired — one of birth | descent | naturalization | other.

isPrimary.description: The person's primary nationality (at most one active).

lostOn.description: ISO-8601 date the citizenship was lost; null = currently held.

ClosureReport.description: The result of a closure verify/rebuild for one graph (D-ClosureIntegrity / D-ClosureDriftHealth).

extraCount.description: Spurious stored closure rows the recompute did not produce.

graph.description: The graph code this report covers.

missingCount.description: Closure rows the recompute found missing vs. the stored closure.

sample.description: Optional small drift sample for diagnostics.

ClosureReportList.description: Per-graph closure reports (one per graph processed).

Contribution.description: One reason an ALLOW was reached. instanceAdmin true means the instance plane; otherwise the assignment is named.

CreateAccountRequest.description:
Create an account for a person, optionally linking its first external identity in the same
operation. The first identity on a new account is always permitted (the linking cap applies
only to ADDITIONAL identities).

identity.description: The first login point to link; omit to create a login-less account shell.

CreateDocumentRequest.description: Attach a paper to a person. The type and (optional) issuing country are validated against their registries.

CreateDocumentTypeRequest.description: Add a document (paper) type to the catalog.

attrSchema.description: Optional per-type attribute schema (D-DocumentAttrSchema); validated on document write when set.

name.description: Default-locale label; translatable via the localization store.

CreateMembershipRequest.description: Add a person's belonging to a unit, optionally filling a position. The position (if given) must belong to the unit.

effectiveFrom.description: When the membership takes effect; defaults to now.

orderItemId.description: Optional provenance pointer to the authorizing order item (D-Orders).

positionId.description: The position to fill; omit for plain belonging.

CreateOrderRequest.description: Create a draft order for an issuing unit, with its items (≥1).

CreateOrderTypeRequest.description: Add an order type to the catalog.

category.description: One of personnel-list | appointment | leave-travel | discipline-incentive | duty-roster.

effect.description: One of membership-start | membership-end | rank-change | record-only.

name.description: Default-locale label; translatable via the localization store.

CreatePersonRequest.description: Create a person — no account and no unit required (L-AccountOptional / D-PersonGlobal).

rankId.description: Optional initial rank (validated against the rank scheme).

sex.description: ISO/IEC 5218 value; defaults to not_known when omitted.

CreatePersonalCodeRequest.description: Attach a national-identifier code to a person. The value is validated against the scheme then encrypted.

value.description: The plaintext identifier (pii:sensitive). Validated against the scheme, then stored as ciphertext + blind index.

CreatePersonalCodeSchemeRequest.description: Add a national-identifier scheme to the catalog.

name.description: Default-locale label; translatable via the localization store.

CreatePositionRequest.description: Create a billet in a unit (vacant). The title is the default-locale fallback; additional locales are set via LocalizationService.

title.description: The default-locale title (the i18n fallback); translatable separately.

CreateRoleRequest.description: Create a custom role. name/description are the default-locale fallbacks (translatable separately).

permissions.description: Permission codes from the catalog; instance-scope and unknown codes are rejected.

CreateUnitRequest.description: Create a unit. `name` is the default-locale text; other locales are managed via LocalizationService.

DeactivateRequest.description: Begin reversible deactivation; opens a grace window (purgeAfter = now + the configured grace).

reason.description: Optional free-text reason recorded in the audit entry.

Document.description: A person-held paper of some type — metadata only (no binaries). number/issuer are pii:basic.

attributes.description: Free-form long-tail per-type fields (JSONB). pii:special ceiling.

id.description: The document's URN RID.

issuedOn.description: ISO-8601 date the document was issued.

issuingCountry.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 code of the issuing country (geo registry); lets one person hold same-type papers from several countries.

number.description: The document number (passport no., licence no.). pii:basic.

status.description: One of active | superseded | revoked — self-asserted, reversible, orthogonal to deletion.

DocumentPage.description: A page of documents plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

DocumentType.description: An instance-admin catalog entry naming a PAPER kind (passport, driver-license). Stable code + translatable name.

attrSchema.description:
Optional per-type attribute schema (D-DocumentAttrSchema): when set, a document's
`attributes` is validated against it on write. Shape:
{ "fields": { "<name>": { "type": "string|number|boolean|date", "required": bool, "enum": [...]? } } }.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (D-Code); immutable by convention.

id.description: The document type's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

name.description: The translatable label as a locale -> text map (all enabled locales; D-i18n).

Email.description: A person's contact email (D-PersonContactChannels). pii:contact; distinct from the login email.

isPrimary.description: The person's primary email (at most one active).

provider.description: Provider derived from the address domain on write (gmail.com -> google); null when no mapping.

typeCode.description: The email-type catalog code (personal | work | other ...).

EmailType.description: An instance-admin catalog entry naming a contact-email kind. Stable code + translatable name.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (D-Code); immutable by convention.

name.description: The translatable label as a locale -> text map (all enabled locales; D-i18n).

EndMembershipRequest.description: End a membership, vacating any filled billet (reversible status flip + effectiveTo).

effectiveTo.description: When the membership ended; defaults to now.

orderItemId.description: Optional provenance pointer to the authorizing order item (D-Orders).

Explanation.description: Why a decision was reached. For ALLOW, the contributing grants (may be several across graphs); for DENY, the reason.

ExternalIdentity.description:
A verified (issuer, subject) login point federating to one account (Object External
identity). Globally unique; immutable once created and removed by unlink. No token columns —
access/refresh tokens are never persisted.

accountId.description: The URN RID of the account this identity federates to.

id.description: The external identity's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

subject.description: The IdP `sub` — a pseudonymous identifier for the person.

FillPositionRequest.description: Fill a vacant position with a person (a membership referencing the position; its unit is the position's unit).

GrantAssignmentRequest.description: Grant a role to a person at a target unit. graph applies to subtree scope (default command); ignored for unit.

graph.description: The cascade graph CODE for a subtree grant; omit to default to the command graph. Ignored for unit scope.

GrantInstanceAdminRequest.description: Place a person on the instance-admin plane.

Graph.description: A named hierarchy over the units (D-Graphs). Each graph is independently a DAG.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (e.g. command, operational); referenced by edges/closure/assignments.

id.description: The graph's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

isAuthorityBearing.description: Whether the PDP cascades subtree grants over this graph (D-DirectoryGraphs). command is locked TRUE.

isDefault.description: The graph a subtree grant uses when none is named; exactly one default exists (seeded command).

GraphList.description: The graph registry, in display order.

InstanceAdmin.description: A person on the instance-wide authority plane (the reified link__instance_admin).

grantedBy.description: The granting person RID; null for the install bootstrap grant.

id.description: The grant's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

LinkIdentityRequest.description: Link a verified (issuer, subject) login point to an account.

Locale.description: A supported language for the deployment. `code` is the stable ISO 639-3 identifier; `name` is the endonym.

code.description: ISO 639-3 code (e.g. ukr, eng); the stable, locale-agnostic identifier.

isDefault.description: Exactly one enabled locale is the default; its value is the fallback when a translation is absent.

LocaleList.description: The supported locales, in display order.

Membership.description:
A person's belonging to a unit (the reified link__member_of), effective-dated, optionally
filling a position. A position-less membership is plain belonging. Reversible: ending flips
status and sets effectiveTo rather than deleting, vacating any filled billet.

effectiveTo.description: When the membership ended; null while active.

id.description: The membership's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

orderItemId.description: Provenance — the order (наказ) item that authorized this fill/belonging (D-Orders); null when created without an order.

personId.description: The URN RID of the person who belongs / fills.

positionId.description: The URN RID of the position this membership fills; null for plain belonging.

unitId.description: The URN RID of the unit belonged to.

MembershipPage.description: A page of memberships plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

MessengerLink.description:
Reachability on a messenger platform over one of the person's existing channels
(D-PersonSocialChannels). Exactly one of phoneId/emailId is set.

emailId.description: The URN RID of the person's email this link annotates; null when the link is over a phone.

isPrimary.description: The person's primary messenger reachability (at most one active).

phoneId.description: The URN RID of the person's phone this link annotates; null when the link is over an email.

verifiedAt.description: When the reachability was verified; null when unverified.

NameVariant.description: A full transliterated name form for one locale (e.g. ukr native, eng Latin). Person-managed, NOT the localization store.

locale.description: The locale/script this form is for (an i18n_locales code).

Order.description: An order header (наказ) plus its items. Mutable while draft; locked on issue.

id.description: The order's URN RID.

issuingUnitId.description: The unit that issues the order (NOT NULL — no instance-level orders); anchors unit-scope authz.

items.description: The order's items (≥1). Returned on get/create/issue/revoke; empty on list pages.

number.description: The order number (unique within its issuing unit).

revokedByOrderId.description: The later order that revoked this one (set on revoke).

OrderItem.description: One affected person/act within an order. Parent-scoped — no lifecycle of its own.

effectiveFrom.description: ISO-8601 date the act takes effect (legal metadata, not a scheduler trigger).

effectiveTo.description: ISO-8601 date the act ceases effect.

id.description: The order item's URN RID.

note.description: Free-text detail (reason, reference). pii:basic — minimized, no secrets.

positionId.description: Target billet RID (appoint/dismiss); per the type's effect.

rankId.description: Target rank RID (rank-change); per the type's effect.

typeId.description: The order type's URN RID (its effect drives the required target columns).

unitId.description: Target unit RID (arrival/transfer/appointment); per the type's effect.

OrderItemInput.description: One item in a create/edit request. Which targets are required is validated against the type's effect.

OrderPage.description: A page of orders plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted). Items are omitted on list rows.

OrderType.description: An instance-admin catalog entry naming an order kind (arrival, appoint, leave-annual). Stable code + translatable name, with a category and an effect.

category.description: One of personnel-list | appointment | leave-travel | discipline-incentive | duty-roster.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (D-Code); immutable by convention.

effect.description: The downstream consequence — one of membership-start | membership-end | rank-change | record-only.

id.description: The order type's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

name.description: The translatable label as a locale -> text map (all enabled locales; D-i18n).

Person.description:
An individual personnel record. Names follow the Unicode CLDR fixed field set
(D-PersonNamesCLDR): displayName is authoritative, the structured parts are advisory. There
is no patronymic field — the Slavic по-батькові lives in given2. nameVariants/citizenships/
residences are populated by getPerson and empty in list responses.

attributes.description: Free-form long-tail directory fields (JSONB). pii:special ceiling — no special-category data without the envelope seam.

birthdate.description: ISO-8601 calendar date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD); a day, not an instant.

callSigns.description: The person's call signs. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

citizenships.description: The person's citizenships. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

code.description: Optional stable, locale-agnostic external id (e.g. personnel/service number); unique among active persons.

countryOfBirth.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code, validated against the geo registry (D-Geo).

displayName.description: The canonical full name form; authoritative for search/display.

emails.description: The person's contact emails. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

given2.description: Second given name; also holds the Slavic по-батькові / Icelandic patronymic.

id.description: The person's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

messengerLinks.description: The person's messenger reachability links. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

nameVariants.description: Locale-tagged transliterations. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

phones.description: The person's contact phones. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

purgeAfter.description: End of the reversibility window; purge is refused before it.

rankId.description: The URN RID of the one rank the person holds (a DIRECTORY attribute; never an authz input). Null when unranked.

residences.description: The person's residence history. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

sex.description: Biological sex, ISO/IEC 5218 as text — one of not_known | male | female | not_applicable.

socialAccounts.description: The person's standalone social accounts. Populated by getPerson; empty in list responses.

status.description: Lifecycle status — one of active | deactivated | purged.

surnamePrefix.description: Nobiliary / genealogical particle (van, von, de, bin).

PersonPage.description: A page of persons plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

PersonalCode.description: A person-held government identifier of some scheme. Its value is pii:sensitive — stored encrypted, returned decrypted here.

id.description: The personal code's URN RID.

schemeCode.description: The scheme this code belongs to (its country derives from the scheme).

value.description: The decrypted national-identifier value (pii:sensitive). Reading it is a sensitive action gated by personal-code.read.

PersonalCodeScheme.description: An instance-admin catalog entry naming a country-namespaced national-identifier scheme (ua-rnokpp, us-ssn).

code.description: The scheme id (D-Code); the natural key. Immutable by convention.

countryIso.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 code of the scheme's country (geo registry).

genericCategory.description: Semantic grouping — one of tax-id | national-id | social-insurance | health-insurance | residence-permit | other.

name.description: The translatable label as a locale -> text map (D-i18n).

validationRegex.description: Optional data-side fallback format check (a compiled validator takes precedence).

Phone.description: A person's contact phone (D-PersonContactChannels). number is E.164-normalized; country is derived. pii:contact.

country.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code derived from the number; null when underivable.

isPrimary.description: The person's primary phone (at most one active).

number.description: The phone number, E.164-normalized on write.

typeCode.description: The phone-type catalog code (mobile | home | work | other ...).

PhoneType.description: An instance-admin catalog entry naming a contact-phone kind. Stable code + translatable name.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (D-Code); immutable by convention.

name.description: The translatable label as a locale -> text map (all enabled locales; D-i18n).

Platform.description: An instance-admin catalog entry naming a social network / messenger (D-PersonSocialChannels). Stable code + translatable name + category.

category.description: One of messenger | social. Only messenger platforms may carry a messenger link.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (D-Code); immutable by convention.

name.description: The translatable label as a locale -> text map (all enabled locales; D-i18n).

Position.description:
A unit-owned billet (D-Position) — an Object that exists whether or not anyone fills it (a
VACANCY is an active position with no active filling). Position grants no authority. The
current holder is populated by getPosition and is null in list responses.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier, unique within the unit; immutable by convention.

holder.description: The current active filling, if any. Populated by getPosition; null in list responses.

id.description: The position's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

requiredRankId.description: Optional advisory establishment rank (a rank RID); never enforced against any filler.

sortOrder.description: App-managed display order within the unit.

status.description: One of active | abolished (abolish is a reversible status flip).

title.description: The billet title as a locale -> text map (default-locale fallback + i18n translations).

unitId.description: The URN RID of the owning unit.

PositionPage.description: A page of positions plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

Rank.description: A specific grade within a type (e.g. sergeant, associate_professor), ordered for exact seniority.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier (D-Code); unique within its type among active ranks.

id.description: The rank's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

name.description: locale->text display name (all enabled locales; default-locale fallback + i18n store).

sortOrder.description: Seniority ordinal among active siblings within the type (lower = more junior).

typeId.description: The URN RID of the owning rank type.

RankCategory.description: The top level of the scheme (e.g. army, navy; or academic, administrative), ordered.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier; unique among active categories.

id.description: The category's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

types.description: The category's types in seniority order. Populated by getRankScheme; empty on create/update of the category.

RankScheme.description: The whole scheme, categories -> types -> ranks, each level in seniority order.

RankType.description: A band within a category (e.g. officers, warrant, enlisted), ordered.

categoryId.description: The URN RID of the owning rank category.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier; unique within its category among active types.

id.description: The type's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

ranks.description: The type's ranks in seniority order. Populated by getRankScheme; empty on create/update of the type.

sortOrder.description: Seniority ordinal among active siblings within the category.

Residence.description: A person's effective-dated residence in a country/region (D-Geo). Locator data (pii:contact).

validTo.description: ISO-8601 date the residence ended; null = current.

RevokeOrderRequest.description: Revoke an issued order. The optional revoking order's RID is recorded as revoked_by_order_id.

Role.description: A named set of permission codes (Object Role). Base roles are seeded and immutable.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier; immutable by convention.

description.description: The role description as a locale -> text map; empty when unset.

id.description: The role's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

isBase.description: True for seeded base roles (immutable by instance admins).

name.description: The role name as a locale -> text map (default-locale fallback + i18n translations).

permissions.description: The role's permission codes (the closed catalog; code-defined).

RolePage.description: A page of roles plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

SerializableError.description: The Conjure error envelope returned on any non-2xx response.

errorCode.description: Coarse category, e.g. NOT_FOUND, INVALID_ARGUMENT, PERMISSION_DENIED, CONFLICT, FAILED_PRECONDITION.

SetRankRequest.description: Set or clear the person's one rank. An absent rankId clears it (D-Rank).

rankId.description: The URN RID of the rank to assign; omit to clear the person's rank.

SocialAccount.description:
A person's standalone social-network account (D-PersonSocialChannels). platformUserId is the
platform's immutable internal id (the durable key); handle is the mutable current @handle.

confidence.description: Weight of the claim — one of confirmed | probable | possible.

handle.description: The current @handle (mutable; rename history kept separately).

isPrimary.description: The person's primary social account (at most one active).

platformCode.description: The platform code the account is on.

platformUserId.description: The platform's immutable internal id (the durable key); null when unknown.

platformVerified.description: The platform "blue-check"; distinct from operator confirmation.

profileUrl.description: Profile URL; derived from platform + handle on write when not supplied.

source.description: How the account was learned — one of self_declared | operator_verified | imported.

verifiedByOperatorAt.description: When an operator confirmed the account; null when unconfirmed.

SocialAccountHandle.description: One period in a social account's @handle-rename history (D-PersonSocialChannels). validTo null = current.

validTo.description: When this handle stopped being current; null = current.

Unit.description: A node in the org graph. `code` is the stable external reference; `name` is the locale->text map.

code.description: Stable, locale-agnostic identifier external systems reference (D-Code); unique among active units.

id.description: The unit's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

level.description: Optional ordinal for sort/filter; never a PDP or shadow-gate input.

name.description: locale->text display name (all enabled locales; default-locale fallback + i18n store).

unitKind.description: Descriptive instance label (e.g. battalion); never branched on in code.

UnitEdge.description: A directed parent->child relationship within one graph (link__parent_of).

graph.description: The graph code this edge belongs to.

id.description: The edge's URN RID (carried as a plain string).

UnitPage.description: A page of units plus the opaque token for the next page (empty when exhausted).

UnitRef.description: A lightweight unit reference with its closure depth (ancestor/descendant listings).

depth.description: Closure distance from the queried unit (shortest path in the DAG).

UnitRefList.description: An ordered list of unit references (ancestors), nearest first.

UnitRefPage.description: A page of unit references (descendants) plus the opaque next-page token.

UnitState.description: A unit's lifecycle state. Transitions are reversible and recorded as append-only events.

UpdateCategoryRequest.description: Edit/reorder a category. Omitted fields are unchanged. `code` is immutable by convention.

UpdateDocumentTypeRequest.description: Edit a document type. `code` is immutable by convention.

attrSchema.description: Replace the per-type attribute schema (D-DocumentAttrSchema). Omitted leaves it unchanged.

UpdateGraphRequest.description: Rename / set default / flip isAuthorityBearing (guarded). Omitted fields are unchanged.

isDefault.description: Setting true makes this the sole default; the previous default is cleared in the same transaction.

UpdateLocaleRequest.description: Enable/disable, rename, set default, or reorder a locale (instance-admin; `locale.manage`). Omitted fields are unchanged.

isDefault.description: Setting true makes this the sole default; the previous default is cleared in the same transaction.

UpdateOrderRequest.description: Edit a draft order. Omitted scalar fields are unchanged; when `items` is present it REPLACES the draft's items. Rejected once issued.

UpdateOrderTypeRequest.description: Edit an order type. `code`, `category`, and `effect` are immutable by convention.

UpdatePersonRequest.description:
Update a person's names (canonical + CLDR parts), birthdate, sex, country_of_birth, and
attributes. Omitted fields are unchanged; an empty string clears an optional name part.
`code` is immutable by convention and rank is set via setRank.

UpdatePersonalCodeRequest.description: Update a personal code's value (re-validated + re-encrypted) and/or status. Omitted fields are unchanged.

UpdatePersonalCodeSchemeRequest.description: Edit a scheme. `code` is immutable by convention.

UpdatePositionRequest.description: Update a position's title / required rank / sort order. `code` and unit are immutable. Omitted fields are unchanged.

requiredRankId.description: Set the advisory required rank; omitted leaves it unchanged (clearing it is an open seam).

UpdateRankRequest.description: Edit/reorder a rank. Omitted fields are unchanged. `code` is immutable.

UpdateRoleRequest.description: Update a custom role's name/description and (when present) replace its permission set. code/isBase immutable.

permissions.description: When present, fully replaces the permission set. Omit to leave permissions unchanged.

UpdateTypeRequest.description: Edit/reorder a type. Omitted fields are unchanged. `code` is immutable.

UpdateUnitRequest.description: Update name/kind/level/metadata/visibility. Omitted fields are unchanged. `code` is immutable.

UpsertCallSignRequest.description: Add a call sign, or replace one when id is supplied. The value is required and unique per person.

id.description: The URN RID of an existing call-sign row to replace; omit to add a new row.

UpsertCitizenshipRequest.description: Add or replace the active citizenship for a country (keyed by (person, country)).

basis.description: birth | descent | naturalization | other; defaults to other.

UpsertEmailRequest.description: Add a contact email, or replace one when id is supplied. provider is derived from the address.

id.description: The URN RID of an existing email row to replace; omit to add a new row.

UpsertMessengerLinkRequest.description:
Add a messenger link over one of the person's phones or emails, or replace one when id is
supplied. Exactly one of phoneId/emailId must be set; platformCode must be a messenger platform.

id.description: The URN RID of an existing messenger-link row to replace; omit to add a new row.

UpsertNameVariantRequest.description: Add or replace the name variant for a locale (keyed by (person, locale)).

UpsertPhoneRequest.description: Add a contact phone, or replace one when id is supplied. number is E.164-normalized and country derived.

id.description: The URN RID of an existing phone row to replace; omit to add a new row.

UpsertResidenceRequest.description: Add a residence row, or replace one when id is supplied.

id.description: The URN RID of an existing residence row to replace; omit to add a new row.

UpsertSocialAccountRequest.description: Add a social account, or replace one when id is supplied. handle is normalized and profileUrl derived when omitted.

confidence.description: confirmed | probable | possible; defaults to possible.

id.description: The URN RID of an existing social-account row to replace; omit to add a new row.

VersionInfo.description: Binary and schema revision the running server reports.

Visibility.description: A unit's read-time visibility. SHADOW units are filtered by the shadow gate (M7).

Whoami.description:
The caller's own resolved PDP context — the person (and optional account) the inbound token
mapped to. Produced from the request context the validation middleware attached.

accountId.description: The URN RID of the resolved account; absent only on out-of-band/system contexts.

email.description: The account's IdP-asserted email, if any.

personId.description: The URN RID of the resolved person (the PDP subject).

info.description: Generated from the Conjure contract (api/*.conjure.yml) by tools/ir2openapi — do not hand-edit. Every endpoint takes a bearer token; authorization is decided by the PDP.
info.title: go-oikumenea API

post.description:
Issue a draft order: lock it and AUTO-APPLY its structural effects in the same transaction
(D-OrderApply). All-or-nothing — a violated target invariant rolls the whole issue back (the
order stays draft) and surfaces as Order:OrderEffectFailed. Returns Order:OrderAlreadyIssued
if not draft.
